title: Bad Fixture: private path leak
description: A fixture intended to fail validation by leaking a private filesystem path through the source trail into post.frag.html.
blurb: a fixture intended to fail validation by leaking a private filesystem path.
one_sentence_claim: If a private path appears in a public candidate file, the validator must block the draft.
why_this_matters: Public-safety regression test for the path-leak detector.
